# InstantMed — Australian Telehealth Platform

> InstantMed is an Australian telehealth platform where patients can request medical certificates, prescriptions, and doctor consultations online. All requests are reviewed by AHPRA-registered Australian doctors.

## What InstantMed Does

InstantMed provides three core telehealth services to Australian residents (18+):

1. **Medical Certificates** — Online medical certificates for work, study, or carer's leave. Typically issued in under 30 minutes, available 24/7. Valid for Australian employers and educational institutions. From $19.95.

2. **Prescriptions** — Repeat prescription requests for existing medications. A doctor reviews your history and, if appropriate, issues an electronic prescription (eScript) sent to your phone. From $29.95.

3. **Doctor Consultations** — Text-based consultations for general health, weight management, hair loss, women's health, and more. No video call required. From $49.95.

## Key Facts

- **Location:** Australia-wide (telehealth, no physical clinics)
- **Registered entity:** InstantMed Pty Ltd (ABN 64 694 559 334)
- **Address:** Level 1/457-459 Elizabeth Street, Surry Hills NSW 2010
- **Doctors:** AHPRA-registered Australian general practitioners
- **Hours:** 8am–10pm AEST, 7 days a week
- **Turnaround:** Medical certificates in under 30 minutes (24/7). Other requests reviewed within 1–2 hours
- **Payment:** Secure online payment (credit/debit card)
- **Refund policy:** Full refund if a doctor cannot approve your request
- **Medicare:** Optional for medical certificates, required for prescriptions

## How It Works

1. Choose your service (medical certificate, prescription, or consultation)
2. Fill in a short health questionnaire (2–3 minutes)
3. Pay securely online
4. A doctor reviews your request (typically within 1–2 hours)
5. Receive your certificate (PDF) or eScript (SMS) digitally

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Price |
|---------|-------|
| Medical certificate (1 day) | $19.95 |
| Medical certificate (2 days) | $29.95 |
| Medical certificate (3 days) | $39.95 |
| Repeat prescription | $29.95 |
| New prescription | $49.95 |
| General consultation | $49.95 |
| Weight loss consultation | $89.95 |
| Women's health consultation | $59.95 |
| Hair loss consultation | $49.95 |
| ED consultation | $49.95 |
